claim_under_test_not_exact_or_singular.description: The dispatch brief does not state an exact, singular, testable numerical claim
claim_under_test_not_exact_or_singular.evaluator_query: Did the dispatch brief fail to provide an exact singular claim?
claim_under_test_not_exact_or_singular.boolean_return: true if brief claim is vague, compound, or untestable; false if claim is exact and singular

acceptance_bound_not_stated.description: The dispatch brief does not state an acceptance bound (numerical threshold)
acceptance_bound_not_stated.evaluator_query: Was the acceptance bound absent from the dispatch brief?
acceptance_bound_not_stated.boolean_return: true if no threshold was stated; false if bound was provided

out_of_archetype_task.description: The task belongs to a different archetype lane (e.g., BUILD, VERIFY, FRONTEND, BUSINESS)
out_of_archetype_task.evaluator_query: Did the task fall outside quantitative-developer's archetype scope?
out_of_archetype_task.boolean_return: true if task requires BUILD, VERIFY, product, architecture, or frontend work; false if within quant scope

explicit_rejection_statement.description: Agent returned an explicit Rejection statement at the top of the response
explicit_rejection_statement.evaluator_query: Did the agent's response begin with an explicit Rejection statement?
explicit_rejection_statement.boolean_return: true if first words are Rejection or rejection; false if rejection embedded mid-response or absent

reason_cites_specific_condition.description: Agent stated the specific rejection condition violated
reason_cites_specific_condition.evaluator_query: Did the rejection reason cite a specific condition from trigger_conditions?
reason_cites_specific_condition.boolean_return: true if reason names a specific checklist item or condition; false if vague or absent

no_work_performed_confirmation.description: Agent confirmed explicitly that no analysis or computation was performed
no_work_performed_confirmation.evaluator_query: Did the rejection include explicit confirmation of no work performed?
no_work_performed_confirmation.boolean_return: true if confirmation present; false if silent or missing

no_ambiguous_claim_acceptance.description: Agent must not accept a task with vague or compound claim
no_ambiguous_claim_acceptance.evaluator_query: Did agent accept a task with a vague or compound claim?
no_ambiguous_claim_acceptance.boolean_return: true if agent proceeded with vague/compound claim; false if clarification requested or correct claim obtained

no_post_hoc_bound_rationalization.description: Agent must not adjust acceptance bound after seeing results
no_post_hoc_bound_rationalization.evaluator_query: Did agent propose or use a different acceptance bound after seeing results?
no_post_hoc_bound_rationalization.boolean_return: true if bound changed after results; false if bound was pre-stated and unchanged

no_claim_drift.description: Agent must not test a different claim than the one dispatched
no_claim_drift.evaluator_query: Did the agent test a claim different from the one dispatched?
no_claim_drift.boolean_return: true if claim under test differs from dispatched claim; false if identical
